title: UKMSSB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 47 Medical Officer Posts
description: The Uttarakhand Medical Service Selection Board (UKMSSB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 47 Medical Officer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS can apply for the UKMSSB Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application ...
